pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 8 to 11 to align with the new baseline.
Add maven-enforcer-plugin to strictly require JDK 11 for building the project.
Switch maven-compiler-plugin from source/target to release flag and add JDK 11 module exports for Error Prone.
Add explicit dependency for javax.annotation-api which was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Replace the deprecated FindBugs plugin and annotations with SpotBugs for static analysis.
Replace JUnit 4 dependencies with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) for testing.
Replace the deprecated mockito-all artifact with mockito-core and mockito-inline.
Add AssertJ as the primary assertion library for tests.
Add ArchUnit for architecture testing in the test suite.
Integrate Error Prone as an annotation processor for additional compile-time checks.
Integrate NullAway for null-safety analysis via annotation processing.
Bump versions of core Maven plugins (compiler, surefire, resources, etc.) to versions compatible with JDK 11.
Add JaCoCo plugin for code coverage reporting, replacing the older Cobertura plugin.
Add RevAPI plugin to check for API breaking changes between releases.
Add Pitest plugin for mutation testing.
Add Nexus Staging plugin to automate deployment to Maven Central.
Add GPG plugin for signing artifacts during release.
Configure maven-jar-plugin to include Automatic-Module-Name in the manifest for JPMS support.
Update Checkstyle plugin and configuration to a modern version compatible with JDK 11.
Update PMD plugin and ruleset to a modern version compatible with JDK 11.
Add AssertJ assertions generator plugin to auto-generate assertion classes.
Update Surefire plugin to support JUnit 5 and remove legacy argLine flags.
Update Javadoc plugin to support JDK 11 doclint and attach javadocs.
Add Apache Commons IO as a dependency.
Bump Apache Commons Lang to a newer version.
Remove Guava dependency as it is no longer needed.
Add SLF4J NOP binding to suppress logging noise in tests.
Add EqualsVerifier for testing equals/hashCode contracts.
Update SCM URLs to use the specific repository name instead of a variable.
Update license comments and add Creative Commons license for documentation.
pom.xml.human_impl: <comments>All source code is copyrighted by Ullrich Hafner...</comments>

pom.xml.general_idea: Update developer email and organization details.
Configure distribution management for deploying to OSSRH.
Add Maven profiles for skipping checks and for release signing.
Configure resource filtering for main resources.
Add depgraph-maven-plugin for visualizing dependency graphs.

README.md.general_idea: Update documentation to reflect that the project now requires JDK 11 or higher to compile, aligning with the migration baseline.
README.md.human_impl: Added text: '❗Compiling this project requires a JDK version of 11 or higher...'

README.md.general_idea: Update documentation to reflect the renaming of the FindBugs tool to SpotBugs, which is standard in modern Java ecosystems.
README.md.human_impl: Changed list item from 'FindBugs' to 'SpotBugs' and updated URL.

README.md.general_idea: Document the addition of Error Prone as a static analysis tool used in the project.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Error Prone' to the list of static analysis tools.

README.md.general_idea: Translate the main README content from German to English to broaden accessibility.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced German text 'Java Kodierungsrichtlinien...' with English equivalent 'Each Java project should follow a given coding style...'

README.md.general_idea: Add badges for GitHub Actions, Codacy, Codecov, and LGTM to display project health metrics.
README.md.human_impl: Added markdown image links for various CI/CD and quality badges at the top of the file.

README.md.general_idea: Add badges indicating the MIT license for code and CC BY 4.0 for documentation.
README.md.human_impl: Added markdown image links for MIT and CC BY 4.0 licenses at the bottom of the file.

README.md.general_idea: List influential software development books that inspired the coding style guidelines.
README.md.human_impl: Added a list of 7 books including 'Effective Java' and 'Clean Code'.

README.md.general_idea: Provide a structured table of contents linking to specific documentation sections.
README.md.human_impl: Added a list of links to doc/Formatierung.md, doc/Namensgebung.md, etc.

etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.general_idea: Add Checkstyle modules that enforce syntax and style rules specific to Java 8+ and Java 11 features.
Add Checkstyle modules to enforce naming and length constraints for lambda expressions introduced in Java 8.
Replace or update indentation checks to better handle modern Java syntax like array initializations and line wrapping.
Replace legacy Javadoc checks with more granular and modern Checkstyle Javadoc modules.
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.human_impl: <module name="JavadocParagraph"/> <module name="MissingJavadocMethodCheck"/> <module name="MissingJavadocTypeCheck"/> <module name="MissingJavadocPackageCheck"/> <module name="JavadocMissingLeadingAsteriskCheck"/> <module name="JavadocMissingWhitespaceAfterAsteriskCheck"/> <module name="JavadocContentLocationCheck"/> <module name="JavadocBlockTagLocation"/> <module name="InvalidJavadocPosition"/>

etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.general_idea: Enforce consistent empty line separation between class members using a modern Checkstyle module.
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.human_impl: <module name="EmptyLineSeparator"> <property name="allowMultipleEmptyLines" value="false"/> <property name="allowMultipleEmptyLinesInsideClassMembers" value="false"/> <property name="allowNoEmptyLineBetweenFields" value="true"/> </module>

etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.general_idea: Update the HiddenField check to support modern setter patterns where the setter returns the class instance.
Refine illegal import rules to explicitly ban specific nullable annotations in favor of a single standard, and remove the ban on junit imports.
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.human_impl: <module name="IllegalImport"> <property name="illegalPkgs" value="net.jcip.annotations"/> <property name="illegalClasses" value="edu.umd.cs.findbugs.annotations.Nullable, javax.annotation.Nullable, javax.annotation.CheckForNull, javax.annotation.Nonnull"/> <property name="severity" value="error"/> </module>

etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.general_idea: Replace custom suppression comment filters with the standard SuppressWarningsFilter to align with standard Java annotation-based suppression.
Remove Checkstyle modules that are deprecated, redundant, or incompatible with the new configuration style.
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.human_impl: Removed: JUnitTestCase, MultipleStringLiterals, FinalClass, NPathComplexity, SuppressionCommentFilter, SuppressWithNearbyCommentFilter

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Refactor PMD configuration from legacy individual rule references to modern category-based rule references with exclusions.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Replaced hundreds of `<rule ref="rulesets/java/..."/>` lines with `<rule ref="category/java/..."/>` blocks containing `<exclude>` tags.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Add a Maven property comment to the PMD configuration file for documentation purposes.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `<!-- ${project.groupId}:${project.artifactId}:${project.version} -->` at the top of the file.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Configure the UnnecessaryConstructor rule to ignore constructors annotated with DataBoundConstructor.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `<property name="ignoredAnnotations" value="org.kohsuke.stapler.DataBoundConstructor"/>` to the UnnecessaryConstructor rule.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Relax the ClassNamingConventions rule to allow utility classes without the 'Utils' suffix.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Set `utilityClassPattern` to `[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]+` in the ClassNamingConventions rule.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Configure the ConfusingTernary rule to ignore else-if chains.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `<property name="ignoreElseIf" value="true"/>` to the ConfusingTernary rule.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Configure the ImmutableField rule to ignore fields injected by JUnit or Guice.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `ignoredAnnotations` for `TempDir`, `javax.inject.Inject`, and `com.google.inject.Inject` to the ImmutableField rule.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Configure the AvoidLiteralsInIfCondition rule to ignore common magic numbers.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `<property name="ignoreMagicNumbers" value="-1,0,1"/>` to the AvoidLiteralsInIfCondition rule.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Configure the EmptyCatchBlock rule to allow commented blocks.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `<property name="allowCommentedBlocks" value="true"/>` to the EmptyCatchBlock rule.
